title: Kerala assembly elections: D Dhanuraj analyses Kerala polls: UDF likely to struggle with compressed campaign period
description: A short 25-day campaign period puts pressure on UDF in Kerala elections, while LDF and BJP appear better prepared, says CPPR Chairman D Dhanuraj. The post Kerala assembly elections: D Dhanuraj analyses Kerala polls: UDF likely to struggle with compressed campaign period appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
